iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Natanz facility struck by US-Israel (Mar 2), IAEA confirmed. 440kg 60% HEU remains under IAEA monitoring — enough for 9 weapons if further enriched. Nuclear program degraded but breakout material intact. Araghchi rejects ceasefire/negotiations. No diplomatic path. No nuclear test.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 06:04 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Iran casualties: 1,444 killed / 18,551 injured. Kataib Hezbollah security commander (Abu Ali al-Askari) confirmed killed in Baghdad airstrike Mar 14. Dubai fire contained, limited flights resuming. Saudi intercepted 37 drones. Iran FM Araghchi still rejecting ceasefire: 'We never asked for a ceasefire, never asked for negotiation.' IRGC claims weapons cache mostly intact, using decade-old missiles only. Trump claims hitting drone factories, Iran 'militarily ineffective.' Brent ~$103.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (rising). Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon - 'ground manoeuvre' underway. IDF strikes 3 Beirut neighborhoods. Israel Katz: displaced Lebanese 'will not return to their homes until Israeli citizens are safe.' UK and allies 'gravely concerned' about ground offensive. Simultaneous extensive strikes on Tehran + Hezbollah targets in Beirut.

turkey.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 82 (rising). 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey — one over Incirlik Air Base, targeting Kürecik radar. Bloomberg: missiles are 'messages for Turkey.' NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 upgrade at Incirlik (replacing Spanish PAC-2). Iran denies targeting Turkey. Iranian refugees flooding in. Missile debris in Dortyol, Hatay.

india.notes: Day 20 05:00 - ELEVATED 25 (stable). India evacuating nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 87 (stable). Russia continues arms support to Iran. Gerasimov: 12 settlements captured in 2 weeks of March, 'offensive in all directions.' 1.28M total Russian losses (Ukraine claim). Ukraine peace talks frozen. NATO fracturing benefits Russia. Missile intercepts over Turkey add NATO-Russia tension.

china.notes: Day 20 06:00 - CRITICAL 50 (rising). PLA flights around Taiwan resume to normal levels after Iran war slowdown — 26 warplanes + 7 naval vessels detected. Trump delays China visit by 'month or so' due to Iran war. Taiwan $42B defense budget. Blockade rehearsals ongoing. US-China trade talks stalled. Xi summit shelved indefinitely.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 78 (stable). No new provocations in 48h. DPRK parliamentary elections held March 16 — rubber-stamp. New Supreme People's Assembly convenes March 22 for constitutional revision. Kim oversaw 600mm MLRS test March 14 (already active signal). UK FCDO condemned ballistic missile launches. Kim focused on internal politics. Exploiting US security gap in ME.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (rising). Gerasimov: 12 settlements captured in 2 weeks, 'offensive in all directions.' Ukraine strikes S-400 + radar in Crimea. Zelensky: Ukraine wants money/tech for ME drone help. Russia recruiting Africans to fill depleted forces. 250 Ukrainian drones on Moscow still dominant theme. Peace talks dead.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Kabul hospital strike aftermath: NYT confirms 75+ civilians killed, 115,000 displaced. Pakistan denies hospital targeting. Both sides vow escalation — no ceasefire in sight. UNSC condemned Afghan terrorism. Fighting enters 3rd week. International calls for ceasefire unheeded. China special envoy mediating with no result.

new: china: china_reduced_flights removed (was -3, flights now normal)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 20 06:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon — major escalation. Iran escalates Gulf attacks (UAE airspace closed, Fujairah fire day 2). 350 tankers stranded at Hormuz. Russia offensive 'in all directions.' China PLA flights resume around Taiwan. Pakistan-Afghanistan: both sides vow escalation. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israel launches 'ground manoeuvre' in Lebanon. Defence Minister Katz: displaced Lebanese 'will not return to their homes until Israeli citizens are safe.' IDF strikes 3 Beirut neighborhoods simultaneously with Tehran strikes. UK and allies 'gravely concerned.'

latest_news.headline: UAE closes airspace — Iran strikes across Gulf, Fujairah oil fire day 2
latest_news.text: UAE temporarily closes airspace as Iran ramps up missile/drone strikes. Loud blasts in Dubai (interceptions). Fujairah oil facility hit for 2nd consecutive day, fire reported. Tanker struck 23nm east of Fujairah by 'unknown projectile.' Explosions reported across Doha.

latest_news.headline: 350 oil tankers stranded at Hormuz — only 80 passed since war began
latest_news.text: IEA: ~350 oil tankers (loaded and empty) stranded near Strait of Hormuz. Only ~80 ships have passed through since war began Feb 28. Iran views US/allied tankers as 'legitimate targets.' Brent ~$103, Guardian warns oil could pass 2008 record of $147.50.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey — NATO eyes Patriot PAC-3 at Incirlik
latest_news.text: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey in past 2 weeks — one over Incirlik Air Base, likely targeting Kürecik radar. Bloomberg: missiles are 'messages for Turkey.' NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 upgrade at Incirlik. Iran denies targeting Turkey.

latest_news.headline: Iran deputy FM: US ground troops would face 'another Vietnam'
latest_news.text: Iran's deputy foreign minister told Sky News that deploying US ground troops would be 'reckless' and result in 'another Vietnam.' Tehran would 'fight for as long as is needed.' Iran's military destroyed but missile capacity degraded, not eliminated.

latest_news.headline: Gerasimov: Russia captured 12 settlements in March, offensive 'in all directions'
latest_news.text: Russian Chief of General Staff Gerasimov: 12 settlements captured in first 2 weeks of March. 'The offensive is being conducted in all directions.' 1.28M total Russian losses claimed by Ukraine. Africa recruitment filling depleted forces.

latest_news.headline: PLA flights around Taiwan resume to normal levels after Iran war slowdown
latest_news.text: No PLA planes detected in Taiwan ADIZ from March 1-11 (except 2 on March 6). Flights resumed gradually March 11-14, returned to normal by March 16. 26 warplanes + 7 naval vessels detected. Trump delays China visit by 'month or so.'

latest_news.headline: NYT: Pakistani airstrikes killed 75+ civilians, displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan
latest_news.text: NYT confirms Pakistani airstrikes killed at least 75 civilians and displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan. Both sides vowing escalation. No ceasefire in sight. Kabul hospital strike (400 killed) dominates. International calls for ceasefire unheeded.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20 06:00) — Global war probability 100%. Day 20 of Iran war. Europe flatly rejects Hormuz coalition — Trump's alliance-building effort failing. Israel signals another month of war minimum. Iran FM refuses ceasefire but says 'war must end.' Russia-Ukraine drone war escalating (daytime Kyiv attack + 250 drones on Moscow). Russia kills 4 in Kyiv, damages Qatari embassy. NATO fracturing over Turkey/Hormuz. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike aftermath — no ceasefire. All primary theaters at IMMINENT. Zero de-escalation in any theater. Brent ~$103.
